metadata.method: Parsed Ağız from the first number before MM and Gramaj from the first number before GR in product text. Grouped by machine code, Ağız and Gramaj. Cycle time is column/field L only; J and K are total/active cavity counts. Recommended cycle is the median of usable cycle times after removing non-positive values, global robust outliers, and practically meaningful group IQR outliers where the group sample supports it. Current DB optimum comparison uses exact normalized machine group + Ağız + Gramaj matches; app-style nearest-match lookup is reported only as a diagnostic when exact matching does not return an authoritative optimum.
